hero.featuresSubtitle: Not a tool you open once — one that follows you in the kitchen, the grocery store, and the gym.

scan.title: Scan directly in the store
scan.description: Point your camera at the barcode on the packaging. CalculEat fetches nutrition data and adds the food in seconds.

recipes.title: Build recipes and see nutrition live
recipes.description: Add ingredients one by one and track calories, protein, fat, and carbs in real time. Save the recipe and log it directly.

share.title: Share lists and recipes with others
share.description: Create shared food lists with family or a partner. Everyone in the group can add, view, and log from the same list.

body.title: Calculate your body composition
body.description: Get an estimate of muscle mass, fat mass, and BMI based on multiple scientific methods. Track the change over time.

goals.title: Set goals and get a concrete plan
goals.description: Enter your weight goal — CalculEat calculates your calorie target, macro distribution, and a realistic timeline. Not an average, your plan.

calculator.title: Try our calculator
calculator.subtitle: Get your personal energy needs instantly — no login required.

cta.title: Precision starts here.
cta.description: CalculEat is built for those who want to truly understand their diet — not for those who settle for rough estimates. An account takes 60 seconds to create.
cta.noPaid: No paid version — all features are available at no cost.
cta.secure: Your data is stored securely and never shared with third parties.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From the grocery shelf to the dinner plate — and everything in between.

step1.title: Scan or search for food
step1.description: Point your camera at the barcode in the store or search our database with thousands of foods. Nutrition data is fetched instantly — you log it with one tap.

step2.title: Build recipes and log meals
step2.description: Create your own recipes and track calories, protein, fat, and carbs in real time as you add ingredients. Log the entire recipe as one serving.

step3.title: Share lists and recipes with others
step3.description: Invite family, a partner, or a training buddy to a shared list. Everyone can add and use foods and recipes from the list.

step4.title: Track your progress and adjust
step4.description: Graphs and statistics show what you're actually eating week by week. Compare against your calorie goal and body composition — and adjust when needed.

hero.title: Powerful features for better health
hero.subtitle: CalculEat combines scientific calculations, smart food logging, and detailed progress tracking in one powerful tool to help you reach your health goals.

calculators.title: Scientific Calculators
calculators.description: Choose from 10 different BMR formulas and 6 PAL systems for maximally accurate calculations tailored to your situation. From Mifflin-St Jeor to Cunningham and Oxford/Henry — we have all the formulas you need.
calculators.highlight4: Personalized calorie goals based on your targets

logging.title: Simple Food Logging
logging.description: Log your meals quickly and easily with our comprehensive food database. Save favorite meals, recipes, and get automatic macro calculations. The calorie density system helps you make smarter food choices.
logging.highlight4: Calorie density system with color coding

macros.title: Professional Macro Programs
macros.description: Preset macro programs for different goals — from healthy eating according to NNR (Nordic Nutrition Recommendations) to bodybuilding-specific modes for bulk and cut. Customize to your needs.

goals.title: Goal Setting & Tracking
goals.description: Set personal goals for weight, calories, and macros. Get daily feedback on your progress and see trends over time. Advanced protein calculations account for your activity level and goals.

body.title: Body Composition
body.description: Measure your body composition with 12 professional methods — from caliper measurements to tape measurements. Track your lean mass and body fat percentage over time.

dashboard.title: Dashboard & Insights
dashboard.description: Get a clear overview of your nutrient intake and progress with visual graphs and statistics. See your daily overview, weekly and monthly reports in one place.

more.title: And much more...
more.subtitle: Explore all the features that make CalculEat the ultimate tool

density.title: Calorie Density System
density.description: Smarter food choices with color-coded foods based on calorie density (volumetrics) for more balanced eating.

recipes.title: Recipe Management
recipes.description: Create and save your own recipes with automatic nutrition calculation. Share with friends or keep them private.

security.title: Security & Privacy
security.description: Your data is safe and private. Export your data whenever you want. GDPR-compliant with no data sales.

cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.subtitle: Create your account today and get access to all powerful features — completely free to get started!
